evals.prompt: Fetch https://example.com and convert it to Markdown so I can reason about the content. What's the main content structure?
evals.expected_output: Clean Markdown representation of example.com homepage, showing content structure with headers, paragraphs, and links

evals.prompt: What's in this GitHub file? https://github.com/nodejs/node/blob/main/README.md - I need to understand the key points about the Node.js project
evals.expected_output: Raw markdown content from the GitHub README, fetched via raw.githubusercontent.com transformation

evals.prompt:
I have this raw HTML snippet: Test Page

Hello

This is a test page with bold text.

. Convert it to Markdown for me.
evals.expected_output: Markdown version with 'Hello' as heading, paragraph with bold text preserved

evals.prompt: I want to fetch https://www.wikipedia.org and extract the main content as Markdown. The raw HTML is too noisy for me to reason about. Make it clean.
evals.expected_output: Markdown representation of Wikipedia's main page with noise removed (scripts, styles, ads), showing readable article structure
